You are a star

Shine effortlessly, embrace your unique features with absolute confidence.

Carla is the best! She made me the night's brightest star! She stayed with me the whole wedding ensuring I always looked and felt wonderful!!

Makeup & hairstyle

We offer fully customizable plan to meet your unique requirements.

MAKE UP 101

  • 1-on-1 Master Class

    Customize your learning experience to excel in your chosen areas, all at your own pace.

  • Professional 1-day Makeup workshop

    Discover popular and practical techniques to apply right away!

  • Self-Makeup Beginner class

    Learn the basics, practice doing your own makeup and make new friends in the process!
